name: Sparkling Red Slush Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the sugar into boiling water until dissolved.
2. Let the mixture cool completely.
3. Add the pineapple juice and cranberry juice, then transfer to a large container.
4. Freeze the mixture for several hours or overnight.
5. Before serving, remove from the freezer about 30 minutes early.
6. Scoop out slush into a punch bowl.
7. When the bowl is half full, slowly add lemon-lime soda (up to 1 gallon total).
8. Mix gently with the back of a spoon before serving.
This can also be prepared by making individual servings: place frozen mixture in glasses and top with soda. Stir well.
